# locale

**Type**

A string that represents a locale short code.

## Declaration

```swift
string locale
```

## Discussion

For a list of locale short codes the App Store supports, see [https://developer.apple.com/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/managing-metadata-in-your-app-by-using-locale-shortcodes].

The locale string is case-sensitive.

For a list of locales and languages the App Store supports, see [https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/app-store-localizations/].

## Default message configuration

- **productId**: A unique identifier for a product, which you create in App Store Connect.
